title: Notifications and Sound
drDigitalIntro:
You control which apps interrupt you.
• Turn off notifications from distracting apps.
• Turn on Do Not Disturb when you want quiet time.
• Look for the bell icon in the menu bar to see if it's on.

playgroundTask.goal: You turned on Do Not Disturb

steps.say: Turn on Do Not Disturb — look for the crossed-bell icon in the menu bar!

drDigitalSuccess: Do Not Disturb is on! See the crossed-bell icon in the menu bar? That means no interruptions until you turn it off.
drDigitalHint: Open Notifications in Settings and flip the Do Not Disturb toggle.
